docket_entries.description: TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1094.5 (TRANSACTION ID # 60215584) FILED BY RESPONDENT KENT, JENNIFER AS DIRECTOR OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH CARE SERVICES

Thomas J. Weiss, Attorney at Law, Tel. 310.788.0710, for plaintiffs;
Carolyn Tsai, of Office of the Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.5590, for defendants.
